title: centaurium perfoliatum
intro: Centaurium perfoliatum, also known as the common centaury or common centuary, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurium perfoliatum include its use as a treatment for digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome and indigestion, as well as its ability to aid in the management of menstrual cramps and other female health issues. Centaurium perfoliatum is commonly prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
